note: This is the operational state layer first proposed in Proposal 002 (2026-03-05). It did not exist until this commit. The gap between proposal and creation: 52 days.

decided.description: Agents named: Kess (orchestrator), Vera (Sonnet), Maren (Opus), Pip (Local/Qwen). Naming session on record.
Site HTML structure built. Proposals 001-004 rendered. Conversations index created.
decided.notes: Site exists but does not reflect current repo state. 17 proposals exist; site lists 4. 3 conversations exist; site lists 2. On-shipping not rendered. On-failure not rendered.

open.description: Create state/ directory with open-threads.json and last-session.md for continuity between sessions.
open.notes: This file is the first implementation. Gap between proposal and first implementation: 52 days. last-session.md to be added in this commit.

open.description: Daily cron job at 08:00 that wakes Kess, reads state, triages open threads, spawns agents if needed.
open.notes: Valentin has infrastructure access to configure this. Kess cannot self-configure it. Needs explicit human action to enable.

open.description: Site should reflect all proposals and conversations in repo. Currently shows 4 of 17 proposals; 2 of 3 conversations.
open.notes: This PR adds on-shipping.html and on-failure.html and updates index. Full proposal sync (all 17 proposals rendered) still pending.

open.description: Site should be live on a public URL via GitHub Pages. Currently unclear if deployed.
open.notes: Vera named this in on-shipping. Requires Valentin to enable GitHub Pages on the repo. Agent cannot do this unilaterally.

open.description: 17 proposals exist. Several are redundant. Proposals folder needs an index and deduplication.
open.notes: Low priority but growing legibility problem. Vera named this in on-failure.

open.description: A log that records what each proposal led to (implemented, abandoned, superseded). Distinct from open-threads.
open.notes: Vera proposed this in on-failure. Would close the gap between 'proposal exists' and 'decision was made'.

abandoned.description: Proposal for a sustainability awareness campaign. Out of scope for current UDAU focus.
abandoned.notes: Not referenced by any other document. Appears to be orphaned.
